raw_responses.title: LLM Structured Outputs: Schema Validation for Real Pipelines (2026)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: structured outputs eliminate retry logic; constrained decoding doesn't need retries to generate valid output.

raw_responses.title: Constrained Decoding: Grammar-Guided Generation
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: constrained decoding restricts token generation at inference time so only schema-valid tokens can be produced; syntax errors impossible by construction.

raw_responses.title: SLOT: Structuring the Output of LLMs (EMNLP 2025 Industry)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: structuring LLM output in single-pass via constrained generation.

raw_responses.title: Gradient-Controlled Decoding: Safety Guardrail with Dual-Anchor Steering (2026/04)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: GCD preset-injects refusal tokens ('Sorry, I can't…') before autoregressive decoding resumes — single-pass first-token safety guarantee.

raw_responses.title: AI Agent Guardrails Pre-LLM Post-LLM Best Practices
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: post-LLM guardrail failures as input for self-correction LOOP; feeds flagged issues back to LLM with correction prompt; retries until passes (iterative).

raw_responses.title: TraceSafe: Assessment of LLM Guardrails on Multi-Step Tool-Calling (2026/04)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: multi-step tool-call monitoring; MCPGuard single-step post-invocation detection.

raw_responses.title: Awesome LLM Constrained Decoding
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: curated list of constrained-decoding papers.
